name: Fusion 360 MCP Server
what_it_does: Autodesk Fusion 360 MCP server enabling AI agents to interact with Fusion 360 — Autodesk's integrated CAD/CAM/CAE cloud platform for product design and manufacturing. Enables creating and modifying parametric 3D designs, running simulations, generating toolpaths for CNC machining, and integrating AI assistance into engineering design workflows.
use_cases: Creating parametric 3D models and assemblies from engineering design agents
Generating CAM toolpaths for CNC machining from manufacturing automation agents
Modifying design parameters and running simulations from optimization agents
Automating repetitive CAD operations from engineering workflow agents
Integrating AI design assistance into product development from innovation agents
not_for: Teams not using Fusion 360 (use SolidWorks, CATIA, or Rhino MCPs for those tools)
Pure artistic 3D modeling (Fusion 360 is engineering-focused; use Blender for artistic work)
Headless server-side CAD (Fusion 360 requires graphical interface)
best_when: A mechanical engineer or product designer using Fusion 360 needs AI assistance creating parametric designs — AI can help with modeling, design iteration, and CAM setup.
avoid_when: You use SolidWorks, CATIA, or other professional CAD tools. Fusion 360 is Autodesk-specific.

auth.notes: No authentication — connects to Fusion 360 running locally via its add-in API. Fusion 360 must be open and the add-in installed. Autodesk account required for Fusion 360 license.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Fusion 360 Personal Use: free for personal, non-commercial use
pricing.notes: Fusion 360 has a free personal use tier (non-commercial). Commercial use requires paid subscription. MCP server is free open source. Autodesk account required.

performance.rate_limits: Local Fusion 360 process — no rate limits; complex CAD operations may be slow

known_agent_gotchas: Fusion 360 must be open and running with add-in installed — not serverless deployable
Fusion 360 API (add-ins) uses Python 3 but within Fusion's Python environment — specific API only
CAD operations affect real design files — implement appropriate confirmation before destructive changes
Fusion 360 updates frequently — add-in compatibility may break with updates
Community MCP — limited documentation; review Fusion 360 API docs for command reference
Cloud simulation features require Fusion 360 cloud credits
agent_readiness.security_notes: Local Fusion 360 connection. Autodesk cloud sync — design files go to Autodesk cloud. Autodesk account required. No direct MCP network exposure. Design IP considerations for cloud storage.

security_score_components.security_notes: Local Fusion 360. Autodesk cloud sync — files stored on Autodesk servers. Evaluate IP sensitivity. Autodesk account required.
